channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Antisocial parking taking two spots, 14th March
item.description:
I passed the street five minutes earlier and saw the two open spots thinking “hopefully one of them is still available when I’m back and need a parking spot”. Coming back five minutes later someone had parked a small car across both spots. It’s a shame and just so antisocial. Should be treated like any other parking violation. Google told me to report it on this website

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Caedmon Road, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
There is broken glass spread over the road and pavement

item.title: Damage to play equipment, 14th March
item.description:

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Fallen tree., 14th March
item.description:
This tree fell down over two weeks ago and is creating all sorts of issues, attracting animals and posing a safety risk for the elderly and wheelchair users.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Ravensbourne Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.description:

item.title: Car parked on pavement, 14th March
item.description:
Car blocking pavement where there are double yellow lines.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldfield Grove, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing litter bin in Mead Way, 14th March
item.description:
The litter bin attached to lamp column M4501 in Mead Way at the junction with Hayes Lane is full to overflowing and there are plastic dog waste bags lying on the ground next to the bin. This bin needs to be emptied ASAP and the dog waste bags picked up and removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime scooter on pavement., 14th March
item.description:
Lime scooters are banned in the London Borough of Lewisham. This should be removed within the agreed 2 hour time limit by Lime.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldfield Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven paving stone opposite 210-212 Hayes Lane, 14th March
item.description:
There is an uneven paving stone opposite 210-212 Hayes Lane which is beyond the Council's 'trip limit'. Please would you inspect and carry out the necessary remedial work so that the stone is cemented in place and lies flat again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in foliage area opposite 222-224 Hayes Lane, 14th March
item.description:
There is a large amount of flytipping in the foliage area opposite 222-224 Hayes Lane. This fly tipping needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise more will appear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
